creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
While testing the patch I noticed this:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: /usr/local/sbin/squid is linked to /usr/local/lib/libltdl.so.7 from devel/libltdl but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libltdl.so:devel/libltdl

I'm figuring out what's libltdl and how squid uses it.
